DEFT'S PC17(B) MOTION REDUCE CHARGE FILED
DEFT'S MOTION BAIL HEARING, RELEASE OR, OR BAIL REDUCTION FILED

/CAL: DEFT'S PC 17(B) MOTION/DAWT/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION FORMISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/CTORD: CHARGE REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR /X:ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL: SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y :PJ 42 D /CTS: 42/WS/WEAP/WEAP2/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMTERM/X: IF WITHIN 6 MONTHS, DEFENDANT HAS NO NEW ARRESTS, CASE CAN BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR/CTORD: FINES AND FEES ARE STAYED/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CCU/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 3/ADPRS1:PC 25400(A)(2) HAVING OCCURRED IN SF ON 06-13-13/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:01-07-21/PPRF/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:STAT OF CDC HOLD/X:DEFENSE INDICATES THAT HOLD HAS BEEN LIFTED,/X:MOTION TO DETAIN IS ADDRESSED/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 11-13-20 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/TE:1HR/LDPX:12-16-20 (30TH DAY)/987,2/NB/X:BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:STATUS OF CDC HOLD #20011567/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 11-13-20/DOP/
/CAL:DEFT'S MOTION TO ROOR OR BAIL REDUCTION/MO DENIED/X:COURT DETAINS DEFENDANT WITHOUT BAIL/X:DATE OF 12-08-20 IS CONFIRMED/
